title: Starlink Mini 2 may come with a major speed downgrade, according to a new leak —and that’s bad news for some users
summary: The “lower uplink speeds” cited by Kutkov will likely be disappointing news to Starlink users who are thinking of upgrading to the Mini 2, especially if they need higher internet speeds for home or business use.
